channel.title: Caramel Macchiato on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Caramel Macchiato on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Caramel Macchiato Recipe (Better Than Starbucks)
item.description: Make a caramel macchiato at home with this easy recipe. Hot or iced, this sweet espresso drink with vanilla syrup and caramel drizzle is simpler than you think.
